tasks.subject: Task 0: Go Project Initialization & SQLite Store
tasks.description: Setup the Go module and the single-writer SQLite store using a goroutine proxy to prevent locks.

tasks.subject: Task 1: Go MCP Server Layer
tasks.description: Expose the Go EventStore via MCP Stdio and compile to static binary.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Python Integration (The `--engine go` Gated Spike)
tasks.description: Add `--engine go` flag to Python CLI and ensure 1:1 pytest parity.
